evidence.snippet: Want to fly specific operations and need containment? Then Beyond flight termination system is your solution.

items.notes: Company's entire product line ('Beyond') is satellite-based flight termination systems for drones

headquarters.notes: Registered address per footer and terms of service. Office is also listed at Fredrik Bajers Vej 300, 9220 Aalborg East (GrowAAL NOVI incubator).

evidence.snippet:
​Beyond is a safety system for drones, making it possible to do long-range missions and operate drones above 25 kg. Based on satellite, the system has unlimited range.
Using Beyond allows termination of the flight independent of the autopilot. This makes drones compliant with drone regulations worldwide.​​

Beyond 12 is the airside unit for the Beyond system. The options are with or without Iridium connection, with or without secondary link, and with or without internal radio. At least one link must be selected.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells flight termination system hardware (Beyond 12 airside unit + Beyond Base Single ground station) that integrates into third-party drones; does not build complete UAS platforms

evidence.snippet: Beyond 12 is the airside unit for the Beyond system. The options are with or without Iridium connection, with or without secondary link, and with or without internal radio. At least one link must be selected.

items.name: Beyond Base Single
items.product_type: handheld ground base station for FTS activation

evidence.snippet:
Beyond Base Single is the base station for the Beyond system. The options are with or without Iridium connection, with or without secondary link, and with or without internal radio. At least one link must be selected.
Note that a Beyond 12 with the same option must be selected along with an Iridium satcom plan to have a complete system.

items.name: Beyond 22
items.product_type: advanced flight termination system with geofencing (in development, Q3 2026)

evidence.snippet:
### Beyond 22
### Price: TBD​
Beyond 22 has all the features of Beyond 12 plus a host of other features, including automated termination based on geography, support for DroneCAN, encryption of the satellite link, and more. Beyond 22 is in development and will be available in Q3 2026.

items.name: Iridium satcom
items.product_type: Iridium satellite communications service plan (1-year subscription)

evidence.snippet: Flat fee for 1 year of satcom service covering 720 operational hours (2 h per day average).
Delivery time depends on our stock and choice of options. Typically between 2 and 4 weeks.

readiness.notes: Beyond 12 and Beyond Base Single are in active production with online purchasing and delivery times of 2–4 weeks. Beyond 22 is a future product (Q3 2026).

fetch_requests.reason: About page was skipped due to class budget; may contain additional company details, founding story, or compliance claims that would sharpen headquarters and role answers
How-it-works page was skipped; may contain additional technical detail on FTS product categories and integration

tagline: Danish flight-termination subsystem supplier. Beyond 12 and Beyond 22 airside units use satellite modem for independent signal interrupt on medium and larger UAS; ground stations (Beyond Base Single/Multi) activate termination. Beyond 12 in production; Beyond 22 in prototype with geofencing and CAN filtering. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Limited public evidence of US integration or program adoption.
